title: Universal 8 inch 2 Sided Knife Blade Sharpening Stone for Home Improvement
description:
This sharpening stone is made of extra-hard aluminum oxide, and is double sided with coarse grit and fine grit, the two grit values being:120 and 240. The coarse grit side can be used for aggressive removal of metal, while the fine grit side is great for quick touch ups or smoothing the cutting edge of a knife. The stone measures 8" x 2" x 1", so it is lightweight and easy to carry around wherever and whenever you might need it. It works great for not only kitchen knives, but also sport, tactical, and pocket knives.
